en: A long time afterward, when the LORD had given rest to Israel from all their surrounding enemies, and Joshua was old and well advanced in years,
zh: 耶和華使以色列人得享平安，不受四圍仇敵的騷擾，已經有一段很長的日子；約書亞已經老了，年紀不小了。

en: Joshua summoned all Israel, its elders and heads, its judges and officers, and said to them, "I am now old and well advanced in years.
zh: 約書亞就把全體以色列人、他們的長老、首領、審判官和官長，都召了來，對他們說：“我已經老了，年紀不小了。

en: And you have seen all that the LORD your God has done to all these nations for your sake, for it is the LORD your God who has fought for you.
zh: 耶和華你們的 神，因你們的緣故，向那些國家所行的一切事，你們都親眼看見了；因為耶和華你們的 神為你們作戰。

en: Behold, I have allotted to you as an inheritance for your tribes those nations that remain, along with all the nations that I have already cut off, from the Jordan to the Great Sea in the west.
zh: 你們看，剩下來的這些國家，連同我剪除的列國，從約旦河起，直到日落之處的大海，我都按著你們各支派，用抽籤的方式，分給你們作產業了。

en: The LORD your God will push them back before you and drive them out of your sight. And you shall possess their land, just as the LORD your God promised you.
zh: 耶和華你們的 神必把他們從你們面前趕出去，驅逐他們離開你們，你們就必得著他們的地作產業，正如耶和華你們的 神所應許的。

en: Therefore, be very strong to keep and to do all that is written in the Book of the Law of Moses, turning aside from it neither to the right hand nor to the left,
zh: 所以你們要十分堅強，謹守遵行寫在摩西律法書上的一切話，使你們不偏向左，不偏向右；

en: that you may not mix with these nations remaining among you or make mention of the names of their gods or swear by them or serve them or bow down to them,
zh: 使你們不與你們中間剩下的這些國家的人來往；他們的神的名字，你們不可提，不可指著他們起誓，不可事奉他們，也不可敬拜他們；

en: but you shall cling to the LORD your God just as you have done to this day.
zh: 只要照著你們一直以來所行的，緊緊倚靠耶和華你們的 神。

en: For the LORD has driven out before you great and strong nations. And as for you, no man has been able to stand before you to this day.
zh: 因為耶和華已經把又大又強的列國從你們面前趕出去；至於你們，直到今日，還沒有一人能在你們面前站立得住。

en: One man of you puts to flight a thousand, since it is the LORD your God who fights for you, just as he promised you.
zh: 你們一人可以追趕千人，因為耶和華你們的 神，照著他應許你們的，為你們作戰。

en: Be very careful, therefore, to love the LORD your God.
zh: 你們自己要十分謹慎，愛耶和華你們的 神。

en: For if you turn back and cling to the remnant of these nations remaining among you and make marriages with them, so that you associate with them and they with you,
zh: 如果你們轉離耶和華，與你們中間剩下的這些國家的餘民聯絡，和他們通婚，互相來往，

en: know for certain that the LORD your God will no longer drive out these nations before you, but they shall be a snare and a trap for you, a whip on your sides and thorns in your eyes, until you perish from off this good ground that the LORD your God has given you.
zh: 你們就必知道，耶和華你們的 神必不再把這些國家從你們面前趕出去；他們必要成為你們的網羅和陷阱，肋下的鞭和眼中的刺，直到你們從耶和華你們的 神賜給你們的這美地上滅亡為止。

en: "And now I am about to go the way of all the earth, and you know in your hearts and souls, all of you, that not one word has failed of all the good things that the LORD your God promised concerning you. All have come to pass for you; not one of them has failed.
zh: “看哪，我今天要走世人必經的路了。你們清清楚楚 知道耶和華你們的 神應許賜福給你們的話，沒有一句落空；完全應驗在你們身上，沒有一句落空。

en: But just as all the good things that the LORD your God promised concerning you have been fulfilled for you, so the LORD will bring upon you all the evil things, until he has destroyed you from off this good land that the LORD your God has given you,
zh: 耶和華你們的 神應許你們的一切福氣怎樣臨到你們身上，耶和華也必照樣使各樣的災禍臨到你們身上，直到把你們從耶和華你們的 神賜給你們的這美地上消滅為止。

en: if you transgress the covenant of the LORD your God, which he commanded you, and go and serve other gods and bow down to them. Then the anger of the LORD will be kindled against you, and you shall perish quickly from off the good land that he has given to you."
zh: 如果你們違背了耶和華你們的 神吩咐你們遵守的約，去事奉別的神，敬拜他們，耶和華必向你們大發烈怒，使你們從他賜給你們的美地上迅速滅亡。”
